_comment: Phase 4.2 MAX_ATTEMPTS held-out partition (E3.C SEALED). rng_seed=PRE_REGISTERED_SEED_42=4_020_704. partition_size=20 (20% of K=100). partition_hash = sha256(sorted(heldout-run_ids).join('\n')). Held-out run_ids drawn from the K=100 canned-baseline runs (prefix 'phase45-calib-{i}-{hex}'); §4.2 study identifies arms via the run_id → arm seam getRetryArmForRun, not via prefix. Sealed against the K=100 calibration committed in gate-calibration-K100.json (commit 76cfc636).
